zh.Cleobury Mortimer, Shropshire, England: 英國史洛普爾可萊奧波利 莫特

zh.Kinlet, Cleobury Mortimer, Shropshire, E: 英國英格蘭史洛普爾金萊特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Brampton於1294年12月16日出生在英國賀福爾布藍普頓 布萊恩時，她的父親Sir Bryan de Brampton31歲，母親Eleanor de Hereford25歲。她於1312年與Sir Edmund de Cornwall在英國賀福爾布藍普頓 布萊恩結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1355年5月18日在英國史洛普爾可萊奧波利 莫特享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Brampton于1294年12月16日出生在英国賀福爾布藍普頓 布萊恩时，她的父亲Sir Bryan de Brampton31岁，母亲Eleanor de Hereford25岁。她于1312年与Sir Edmund de Cornwall在英国賀福爾布藍普頓 布萊恩结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1355年5月18日在英国史洛普爾可萊奧波利 莫特享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: Brampton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from one or more of the many places called Brampton (Northants, Hunts, Herefs, Derbys, Lincs, WR Yorks, Norfolk, Suffolk, Westm, Cumb). There is a distinct early bias towards the E Midlands, E Anglia and Yorks.

variants.name: Brunton
meanings: Scottish and northern English: habitational name from Brunton in Fife, from Old English burna ‘stream’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’. This surname is also common in Ireland.
English: variant of Brompton, a habitational name from any of the places called from Brompton in East and North Yorkshire, Middlesex, and Shropshire. Or, a variant of Branton 2.

variants.name: Brompton
meanings: 1  English: locative name from Brompton (ER Yorks, NR Yorks, Middx, Shrops).

variants.name: Branton
meanings: habitational name from any of the places called Branton in South Yorkshire (formerly in Yorkshire) and Northumberland or from Braunton in Devon. The first and last are named with Old English brōm ‘broom’ + tūn ‘farmstead, settlement’. The second is from an Old English word brēmen ‘overgrown with broom’ + tūn ‘farmstead’.

variant of Brampton, a habitational name from one or more of the many places called Brampton (Northamptonshire, Huntingtonshire, Herefordshire, Derbyshire, Lincolnshire, Yorkshire, Norfolk, Suffolk, Westmorland, and Cumberland), all of which are named with Old English brōm ‘broom’ + tūn ‘farmstead, settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Brampton was born on 16 December 1294, in Brampton Bryan, Herefordshire, England, her father, Sir Bryan de Brampton, was 31 and her mother, Eleanor de Hereford, was 25. She married Sir Edmund de Cornwall in 1312, in Brampton Bryan, Herefordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 18 May 1355, in Cleobury Mortimer, Shropshire, England, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Brampton est née le 16 décembre 1294, à Brampton Bryan, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Bryan de Brampton, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Eleanor de Hereford, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Edmund de Cornwall en 1312, à Brampton Bryan, Herefordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 18 mai 1355, à Cleobury Mortimer, Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Brampton am 16. Dezember 1294 in Brampton Bryan, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Bryan de Brampton 31 und ihre Mutter Eleanor de Hereford 25. Sie hat 1312 in Brampton Bryan, Herefordshire, England Sir Edmund de Cornwall geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 18. Mai 1355 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Cleobury Mortimer, Shropshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Brampton è nata il il 16 dicembre 1294 nel Brampton Bryan, Herefordshire, England, sua padre, Sir Bryan de Brampton, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Eleanor de Hereford, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Sir Edmund de Cornwall nel 1312, nel Brampton Bryan, Herefordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 18 maggio 1355, nel Cleobury Mortimer, Shropshire, England, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Bramptonが1294年12月16日にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアブランプトン ブリアンで生まれた時，父Sir Bryan de Bramptonは31歳，母Eleanor de Herefordは25歳であった。1312年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアブランプトン ブリアンでSir Edmund de Cornwallと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1355年5月18日にイギリスシュロプシュアイアクレオブリー モーティマーで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Brampton(이)가 1294년 12월 16일 영국 허퍼드실르 브램프턴 브라이언에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Bryan de Brampton(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor de Hereford(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1312년 영국 허퍼드실르 브램프턴 브라이언에서 Sir Edmund de Cornwall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1355년 5월 18일 영국 슈럽실르 클리콥리 모르팀어에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.16 December 1294–18 May 1355: 16 de dezembro de 1294–18 de maio de 1355
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Brampton nasceu em 16 de dezembro de 1294, em Brampton Bryan, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Bryan de Brampton, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor de Hereford, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Edmund de Cornwall em 1312, em Brampton Bryan, Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 18 de maio de 1355, em Cleobury Mortimer, Shropshire, Inglaterra, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Brampton родилась 16 декабря 1294 г. в местности брамптон брян, хирефордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Bryan de Brampton было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Eleanor de Hereford, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Edmund de Cornwall в 1312 г. в местности брамптон брян, хирефордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 18 мая 1355 г. в местности клеобури мортимир, шропшир, Англия в возрасте 60 лет.

es.16 December 1294–18 May 1355: 16 de diciembre de 1294–18 de mayo de 1355
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Brampton nació el 16 de diciembre de 1294, en Brampton Bryan, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Bryan de Brampton, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Eleanor de Hereford, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Sir Edmund de Cornwall en 1312, en Brampton Bryan, Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 18 de mayo de 1355, en Cleobury Mortimer, Shropshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 60 años.
